# XTRM-Tools Complete Guide

> **Version 0.5.26** — dual-runtime workflow system for Claude Code + Pi.

## Overview

XTRM is a policy-driven workflow layer.

- **Claude runtime:** plugin hooks + skills + MCP
- **Pi runtime:** extensions + skills + MCP
- **Source of truth:** `policies/*.json` and compiled `hooks/hooks.json`

## Installation

```bash
# Install / sync toolchain
xtrm install

# Optional non-interactive
xtrm install --yes

# Pi runtime sync
xtrm pi install
```

## Runtime Commands

```bash
xt claude [name]      # open Claude in worktree
xt pi [name]          # open Pi in worktree
xt end                # close session (rebase/push/pr/cleanup)
xt worktree list
xt worktree clean
```

`xt` and `xtrm` are equivalent command names.

## Help and Banner Behavior

- `xtrm help` is rich + plain text (minimal styling)
- Banner is shown **only** for `xtrm install` execution
- No banner for other commands (`help`, `docs`, `debug`, `status`, etc.)

## Policy System

Compile and verify policy output:

```bash
node scripts/compile-policies.mjs
node scripts/compile-policies.mjs --check
```

### Active policies

- `using-xtrm.json` (claude)
- `worktree-boundary.json` (claude)
- `session-flow.json` (both)
- `beads.json` (both)
- `quality-gates.json` (both)
- `quality-gates-env.json` (claude)
- `gitnexus.json` (claude)
- `xtrm-debug-logger.json` (claude)
- `service-skills.json` (pi)

## Hook Wiring (Claude)

Generated output: `hooks/hooks.json`

Key runtime hooks:

- `using-xtrm-reminder.mjs` (`SessionStart`)
- `beads-compact-restore.mjs` (`SessionStart`)
- `quality-check-env.mjs` (`SessionStart`)
- `xtrm-session-logger.mjs` (`SessionStart`)
- `worktree-boundary.mjs` (`PreToolUse` write tools)
- `beads-edit-gate.mjs` (`PreToolUse` write tools)
- `beads-commit-gate.mjs` (`PreToolUse` bash)
- `beads-claim-sync.mjs` (`PostToolUse` bash)
- `quality-check.cjs` / `quality-check.py` (`PostToolUse` write tools)
- `gitnexus/gitnexus-hook.cjs` (`PostToolUse` bash/grep/read/glob + Serena)
- `xtrm-tool-logger.mjs` (`PostToolUse`)
- `beads-stop-gate.mjs` + `beads-memory-gate.mjs` (`Stop`)
- `beads-compact-save.mjs` (`PreCompact`)
- `statusline.mjs` (`statusLine`)

## Statusline

`statusline.mjs` renders two lines:

1. `XTRM model host dir branch/status venv`
2. Claimed issue (if present) or open issue count

Style principle: bold/dim/italic only, no hardcoded fg/bg.

## Pi Extensions

Current extension layout is **directory-based** under `config/pi/extensions/<name>/index.ts`:

- `beads/`
- `session-flow/`
- `quality-gates/`
- `service-skills/`

## Docs and Drift

When changing hooks/policies/runtime behavior, update these docs together:

- `docs/XTRM-GUIDE.md`
- `docs/hooks.md`
- `docs/policies.md`
- `docs/pi-extensions.md` (if Pi behavior changed)

## Troubleshooting

```bash
node scripts/compile-policies.mjs --check
xtrm debug --follow
xtrm status
```

If GitNexus is stale in a repo:

```bash
npx gitnexus analyze
```
